texto: Poverty was nature surviving in society
autor: that the limitedness of food and the unlimitedness of men had come to an issue just when the promise of boundless increase of wealth burst in upon us made the irony only the more bitter.
explicacao: Citação de that the limitedness of food and the unlimitedness of men had come to an issue just when the promise of boundless increase of wealth burst in upon us made the irony only the more bitter. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Poverty was nature surviving in society” articula reflexao, karl-polanyi, poverty em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
